description_long: This house features a simple, boxy structure with a predominantly white exterior and a flat roof. The front facade is marked by three distinct doorways with metallic, industrial-style doors, suggesting multiple entry points or units. The interior is partially visible, revealing wooden partition walls and a yellow stairwell or ramp leading to an upper section. A small brick accent and a triangular window or vent are present on one side, adding a touch of texture and color contrast. The roof is flat and includes a prominent yellow section, possibly an access ramp or terrace. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional entryways.
description: A modern, boxy house with a white exterior, flat roof, and three industrial-style front doors. Features include wooden interior partitions, a yellow stairwell, and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing three metallic doors set into a plain white facade, with glimpses of the wooden interior and yellow stairwell.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two open doors, a small brick accent, and a triangular window or vent above the entryways.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the wooden interior structure, yellow stairwell, and the open spatial layout inside.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the flat roof and the large yellow section, with minimal exterior detail visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Three industrial-style metal doors with no porch or overhang, set flush into a plain white facade.
